system: You are a careful technical writer. Plain English, no filler, lead with the verdict.
user: Write a one-page explainer of why a build loop needs at least two critics on a different model family than the builder. Audience: an engineer who already runs single-model self-review.

angles.A-plain: ANGLE: plainest possible framing, no jargon, concrete example first.
angles.B-mechanism: ANGLE: lead with the failure mechanism (shared blind spots) and prove it.
angles.C-skeptic: ANGLE: argue the opposite first (one good model is enough), then refute it.
